PR 类型，请勾选 / Pick the PR type:

- [ ] doc — 文档修订 / Documentation update
- [ ] i18n — 翻译 / Translation
- [ ] charter — 章程修订 / Charter amendment (≥ 14-day discussion)
- [ ] other / 其他
-->

## 摘要 / Summary

<!--
中文一句话 + 英文一句话。
One Chinese sentence + one English sentence.
-->

## 改了什么 / What changed

-

## 为什么 / Why

-

## 利益声明 / Conflict of Interest

<!--
你是否与本 PR 涉及的议题存在利益关联？没有请写 None。
Any personal stake in this PR? Write "None" if not.
-->

## 检查项 / Checklist

- [ ] 中英文版本已同步更新 / Chinese + English versions updated in sync
- [ ] 提交已签署 DCO（`git commit -s`）/ Commits are signed-off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] 已阅读并同意 [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) / Read and agree to the Code of Conduct
- [ ] 未在本 PR 中加入商业推广 / No commercial promotion in this PR
